title: Section 13
content: (1) 2*** All appointments made under section 10, section 11 or section 12 shall be reported to the 1[State Government] by the Inspector-General. (2) Such report shall be either special or general, as the 1]State Government directs. 3* * * * *
footnote: 1. Subs. by the A.O. 1950, for "Provincial Government" 2. The words and figure "All appointments made by the Inspector-General section 6 and" rep. by the A.O. 1937. Earlier these words and figure were ins. by Act 4 of 1914, s. 2 and the Schedule. 3. Sub-section (3) rep. by the A.O. 1937.
